title: DAX measure rename impact across synthetic downstream dependencies
originSignal: A measure rename is requested while report formulas and dependent measures may still reference the old name.
riskPattern: A rename can leave escaped references, helper formulas, or downstream measures unresolved even when the edited expression looks valid.
regressionChecks: Analyze direct and transitive dependencies for a synthetic measure rename.
Generate a rewrite plan before changing dependent expressions.
Separate static reference coverage from target-host calculation behavior.
expectedEvidence: Rename impact report lists synthetic direct and downstream references.
Rewrite plan identifies expressions requiring a safe name update.
Dependency report makes unresolved references visible before publication.
boundaries: Synthetic dependency analysis does not prove semantic equivalence of a business measure.
Workbook behavior proof requires recalculation in the intended Excel Power Pivot host.
nextLiveWorkbookRequirement: Apply the rename to a sanitized model with report formulas, refresh calculation in Excel, and capture before-and-after result checks.
